test1.ptxt: Record details of the problem. For your record, use of a questionnaire form will facilitate collecting information for proper analysis and diagnosis.
Check if the problem described in Customer Questionnaire (Example) actually occurs in vehicle. (This step should be performed with the customer if possible.)
Check ECM and ESP® control module for DTC, and then record DTC(s).

testgroup.question: Is there any DTC(s) other than related to cruise control system (other than DTC P0504, P0575 and P0649)?

action.ptxt: Go to troubleshooting for applicable DTC.

testgroup.question: Is there any DTC(s) related to cruise control system?

action.ptxt: Go to troubleshooting for applicable DTC, and go to Step 5.

test1.ptxt: Inspect and repair basic parts referring to Cruise Control System Symptom Diagnosis .

action.ptxt: Repair or replace malfunction part(s), and go to Step 5.

test1.ptxt: Check for intermittent problems referring to Intermittent Connection and Poor Contact Inspection .

action.ptxt: Repair or replace malfunction part(s), and go to Step 5.

test1.ptxt: Confirm if problem is solved and cruise control system is free from any abnormal conditions. If what has been repaired is related to DTC, clear DTC once and then confirm that no DTC is indicated.

testgroup.question: Is there any problem symptom, DTC or abnormal condition?

action.ptxt: Go to 2) of Step 1 and perform troubleshooting again.
